framework.name: SPICE Actor Chain Profiles (draft-mw-spice-actor-chain-03)
framework.description: IETF draft defining 5 distinct profiles for cryptographically verifiable multi-hop delegation chains built on RFC 8693 token exchange. Critically, it acknowledges that RFC 8693's nested `act` claims are 'informational only' — meaning current OAuth token exchange has NO mechanism to validate or enforce delegation paths. The 5 profiles trade off between full disclosure, subset disclosure, and committed (hash-chain) approaches.
framework.raw_quote: RFC8693 permits nested act claims, but prior actors remain informational only and token exchange does not define how a delegation path is preserved and validated across successive exchanges.

source.title: Cryptographically Verifiable Actor Chain for OAuth 2.0 Token Exchange
